ops.text: RESULTS E30.1 + VERIFY (both lanes opus xhigh; VERIFY recomputed from raw artifacts independently, confirmed=true, zero discrepancies; ~185k tokens, $0 model spend). Outcome per the pre-registered map: STILL-UNDERPOWERED. Numbers: b=10 (FT right / option-0 prior wrong), c=4 (reverse) → only 14 discordant pairs among n=202; exact McNemar p=0.1796; delta=+0.0297 (6/202); session-clustered bootstrap 95% CI [-0.0062, +0.0659] (47 sessions, 10k reps, seed 30); Beta(11,5) posterior P(θ>0.5)=0.941, bootstrap P(δ>0)≈0.93. Item-information audit: 135/202 (66.8%) zero-information (all 6 systems pick identically — option-0 anchoring), 39/202 (19.3%) unwinnable custom-gold; ~14 rows of live signal vs an MDE (0.0499) that exceeds the observed effect. Reading: every directional signal favors the FT model; E29's null was the instrument, confirming the campaign premise. DESIGN INPUT for E30.2a/2b: more n on the same distribution buys information slowly (two-thirds non-discriminating) — E30.2a's pre-registration must report discordant-pair count alongside nominal n, and the accrual monitor (E30.2b) should track discordance rate, not just row count; consider enriching future frames for discordant/custom items. Provenance note (analyst caveat, VERIFY-endorsed): canonical anchor is gate_test.json / first-on-tie argmax (FT 122/202=0.6040); sibling e29_gate.json (123/202) is a stale last-on-tie variant, not used. Artifacts: ~/.cc-steer/experiments/E30/e30_1/out/{results.json,report.md}, analyze.py, verify/verify.py.
